##LOCALITY=Rapid Creek, Yukon Territory, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Dull olive-green platy mass, associated with masses of brighter green acicular gormanite on brown siderite. Metavivianite is twinned around [1 -1 0].
